rulings.Case Title: HESTER MICHAEL VS. LILY NG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 15, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT THERESE LEE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustain with leave to amend to specify damages for non-personal injury cause of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HESTER MICHAEL VS. LILY NG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 15, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANTS LILY NG, THERESE LEE, and RINGO LEE'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Grant motion to strike to reconcile prayer and inclusion of paragraph 13 re UCL cause of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOVICA MAKSIMOVIC et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. RECONTRUST et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 15, 2013, line 2. Order to Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction Off calendar per moving party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY VS. MATHEW KAMELA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 15, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Grant subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ENGELEN, SIGRID AS TRUSTEE OF THE SIGRID ENGELEN VS. NASIR SHAIKH et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 15, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT NASIR SHAIKH, HANIF SHAIKH, AND MOHAMMED SHAIKH'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Overrule - 5 days to answer. Operative 3 days notice is attached and verocity of allegation re prior notice of cure not proper under demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NORMA SHERIDAN VS. SAMUEL J. SANDOVAL et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 15, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT SAMUEL SANDOVAL'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT Deny - 5 days to answer. (1) Issues presented beyond scope of pleadings and (2) Failed to sustain burden re daily damages. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1320-1380 LOMBARD STREET, LLC VS. LETICIA GONZALES et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 15, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT LETICIA GONZALES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Overrule - 5 days to answer. (1) Contrary to moving party lease attached, (2) Explanation of relationship between plaintiff and Lombard place given, (3) Damages not uncertain based on reduced rent, and (4) Verfication sufficient. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SALVADOR SEGOVIA VS. ESTELLA GUERRERO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery From Deft And Request For Monetary Sanctions;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 15, 2013, line 7. PLAINTIFF SALVADOR SEGOVIA'S Motion to Compel Responses to Discovery from Defendant and Request for Monetary Sanctions Grant subject to opposition plus sanctions totalling $760. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GMAC MORTGAGE, LLC F/K/A GMAC MORTGAGE CORPORATION VS. DANIEL ESPINOSA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 15, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT DANIEL ESPINOSA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Overrule prior case dismissed February 13, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GMAC MORTGAGE, LLC F/K/A GMAC MORTGAGE CORPORATION VS. DANIEL ESPINOSA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 15, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT DANIEL ESPINOSA'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT Grant motion to strike with leave to amend to reconcile damages per expiration of 3 day period. = (501/REQ)
